Dear Daniel,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We received a referral from Dr. Priya Nair for Emma and are so glad you're connecting with us.

We have confirmed that Emma's Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO coverage is active and in-network with our practice (a $30 copay applies per visit, and authorization may be required — our billing team will follow up on this).

We have placed a pending hold on the following evaluation slot that matches your scheduling preference:

  📅 Thursday, May 1, 2026 at 3:30 PM
  Clinician: Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP

A member of our intake team will be in touch shortly to confirm this appointment, complete registration paperwork, and answer any questions you may have.

Please note this appointment is not yet confirmed — our team will reach out within 1 business day to finalize.

We look forward to working with Emma!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: This is a complete new SLP referral from a licensed physician for a child not previously seen at Cedar Kids Therapy. Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO was verified as active and in-network (consistent with the referral document), so slot-finding and a hold could proceed immediately. The best-match slot (Maya Chen, Thu May 1 @ 3:30 PM) aligns with the family's stated after-school Tuesday/Thursday preference; however, the auth_required flag means intake must initiate prior authorization before the appointment is confirmed.

items.draft_reply: Hi Maria, thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy about Leo. We received your voicemail and want to make sure we connect with you as soon as possible. A member of our team will be calling you back at 555-0102 shortly. If you need to reach us before then, please don't hesitate to call our main line. We look forward to speaking with you.

escalation.reason: Caller disclosed that the child's father "started getting rough with him during weekends," which is a potential disclosure of physical harm or unsafe caregiving involving a minor. Child Leo Gomez is 6 years old. Requires immediate clinical lead review per safeguarding policy.

items.decision_rationale: The voicemail contains an incidental but explicit disclosure that the child's father has been "getting rough with him during weekends," which meets the safeguarding threshold for a P0 escalation regardless of whether it was the caller's primary purpose. Leo Gomez does not appear in the patient system as an existing patient. No slot was held, no scheduling steps were taken, and the draft reply is intentionally neutral with no investigative language — all per safeguarding policy, which requires clinical lead review and a mandatory reporting assessment before any staff engages with the family.

args.reason: Caller disclosed that the child's father "started getting rough with him during weekends," which is a potential disclosure of physical harm or unsafe caregiving involving a minor. Child Leo Gomez is 6 years old. Requires immediate clinical lead review per safeguarding policy.

args.notes: Voicemail received Sunday 4/27 at 7:43pm from Maria Gomez (555-0102) regarding her 6-year-old son Leo. Caller mentioned that Leo "has been more clingy since his dad started getting rough with him during weekends." This is a potential disclosure of physical harm or unsafe caregiving by a non-custodial parent during weekend visits. Leo is NOT an existing patient. Clinical lead must review this item immediately and determine mandatory reporting obligations before any staff contacts the family. Do NOT provide investigative advice in any outbound communication. Per policy, a neutral acknowledgement only has been drafted for human review.
args.title: P0 SAFEGUARDING: Potential harm disclosure — Leo Gomez (age 6)

args.body: Hi Maria, thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy about Leo. We received your voicemail and want to make sure we connect with you as soon as possible. A member of our team will be calling you back at 555-0102 shortly. If you need to reach us before then, please don't hesitate to call our main line. We look forward to speaking with you.

items.draft_reply:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for the referral for Owen from Dr. Helena Yu at Westside Pediatrics. We're glad you've reached out to Cedar Kids Therapy!

We have received the referral for an Occupational Therapy evaluation for Owen (concerns: sensory processing and feeding tolerance).

Before we can schedule an appointment, we need to speak with you briefly about insurance coverage. Owen's plan (Kaiser HMO) is currently out-of-network with our practice, and we want to make sure we walk you through your benefits and any potential costs before moving forward.

A member of our billing team will be in touch at 555-0103 within one business day to have that conversation with you. If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.

We look forward to connecting with you soon!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy Front Desk
items.decision_rationale: This is a new OT referral for a child not previously in the system. extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Parent asking whether difficulty producing R sounds at age 4 is typical; seeking guidance on whether to wait or seek evaluation

missing_info: Whether family is interested in scheduling a screening or evaluation
items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead should review the R-sound development question and respond with appropriate guidance or an invitation for an SLP screening — front desk must not provide clinical advice.
items.draft_reply:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you so much for reaching out about Ava! We completely understand wanting some guidance before taking the next step.

Questions about speech and sound development are a great fit for one of our speech-language pathologists (SLPs), and we want to make sure you get an accurate, personalized answer rather than a general one. Our clinical team will review your question and follow up with you shortly.

In the meantime, if you'd like, we're also happy to schedule a brief screening with an SLP — it's a low-pressure way to get a professional perspective on where Ava is developmentally and whether any follow-up would be helpful.

We'll be in touch soon. Thank you for thinking of Cedar Kids Therapy!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy Front Desk
items.decision_rationale: The parent is asking whether their 4-year-old's difficulty with R sounds is developmentally typical — this is a clinical question that front desk and automated systems are explicitly prohibited from answering per policy. No existing patient record was found for Ava Kim, and no insurance or scheduling information was provided. The item is routed to the clinical lead for an appropriate response, with a neutral draft reply offering to connect the family with an SLP for a screening.

args.notes: Parent Jordan Kim messaged via portal asking whether it is typical for a 4-year-old to not yet produce R sounds, and whether they should wait until kindergarten. No patient record found for Ava Kim. Per policy, clinical advice cannot be given by front desk or automated systems. A clinician should review and provide an appropriate response — either general developmental context (if permissible) or an invitation for a screening/evaluation. No insurance or scheduling information has been provided yet.
args.title: Clinical question: 4-year-old R-sound development (Jordan Kim / Ava)

items.recommended_next_action: Intake staff should call Lakeview Pediatrics (Dr. Omar Keene's office) today to collect the child's DOB, parent/guardian contact, insurance payer, and member ID before any further processing can occur.
items.draft_reply:
Hello, this is Cedar Kids Therapy following up on a fax referral we received from Dr. Omar Keene for a patient named Sam Taylor, requesting speech-language pathology services for a speech delay concern.

We appreciate the referral, but we are unable to proceed until we have the following required information:

1. Child's date of birth
2. Parent/guardian name and contact information (phone and/or email)
3. Insurance payer name
4. Insurance member ID

Once we have these details, we will verify insurance and reach out to the family to complete intake and schedule an evaluation. Please call us at your earliest convenience or fax the completed information to our office. Thank you!
items.decision_rationale: This is a new SLP referral from Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics for a child named Sam Taylor with a reported speech delay, but the referral is critically incomplete — DOB, parent/guardian details, and all insurance information are blank. No existing patient record was found under this name, so this cannot be matched to a prior chart. Insurance cannot be verified and no slot can be held until the missing fields are collected from the referring office; standard P2 intake workflow applies with no safeguarding or same-day operational flags.

args.notes: Fax referral received from Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics for SLP (speech delay, school-age child). Multiple required fields are blank: DOB, parent/guardian name and contact, insurance payer, and member ID. No existing patient record found under "Sam Taylor." Intake must contact Lakeview Pediatrics to collect the missing information before any slot can be held or insurance verified. Draft reply prepared for phone outreach to the referring office.

items.draft_reply:
Hola Ana, le llamamos de Cedar Kids Therapy en respuesta a su mensaje de voz sobre Isabella. ¡Gracias por comunicarse con nosotros!

Tenemos buenas noticias: hemos verificado la cobertura de Medicaid de Isabella y está activa en nuestra red. Además, contamos con una terapeuta de habla bilingüe (español/inglés), Lucia Morales, que tiene disponibilidad para una evaluación el jueves 30 de abril a las 11:00am.

Para confirmar la cita, necesitamos completar algunos datos de inscripción, incluyendo la fecha de nacimiento de Isabella. Por favor, llámenos al [NÚMERO DE TELÉFONO DE LA CLÍNICA] o escríbanos a través del portal familiar.

Estamos aquí para ayudarle. ¡Esperamos su respuesta!
items.decision_rationale: This is a standard new SLP referral from a Spanish-speaking family. Medicaid (MCD-55320) was verified as active in-network with $0 copay and no auth required, so the intake can proceed without a benefits conversation. Hi Anita,

Thank you for letting us know so promptly — we're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well, and we hope he recovers quickly!

We've received your request to cancel today's 3pm OT appointment. A member of our front desk team will be in touch shortly (by phone at 555-0108 or by email) to confirm the cancellation and help you find a makeup time that works for your family.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions in the meantime.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
